channel.title: Israel National Cyber Directorate (INCD) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Israel National Cyber Directorate (INCD) (incd).

item.title: CVE-2026-45448 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ntopng - CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')
item.description: CWE-601 URL redirection to untrusted site ('open redirect')

item.title: CVE-2026-6923 · 3.8 LOW — Nuvoton - CWE-1300: Improper Protection of Physical Side Channels
item.description: A side-channel attack, which requires a physical presence to the TPM, can lead to extraction of an Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) key.

item.title: CVE-2025-55065 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: CWE-89 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
